violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Open food container in basement walk in cooler.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Open ice buckets underneath exposed rafters in the basement. Recommend placing lids on buckets.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Dry storage shelving in the basement is not a cleanable nonabsorbent surface. The walls and ceiling in the liquor/vegetable cooler in the basement is not a cleanable or nonabsorbent surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors underneath the tables and coolers in the kitchen need cleaning. The bottom shelf on the table in the kitchen needs cleaning. Floors in the meat/cheese cooler in the basement need cleaning.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop in the bucket downstair was stored where it can not dry properly.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
